Long story short on how I fully immersed in the @solana ecosystem 

~ 2020: My Solana journey started when I participated in the Coinlist auction and staked tokens for 12 months. I saw the potential and jumped in. It is still the most profitable investment I’ve ever made. 

~ 2022: @Stepnofficial was launched and I was one of the early users. I was burning 11 energies daily by running 55 min. I one month I had a injury and decided to train with a personal running coach. Opening shoe boxes, upgrading my NFTs, claiming achievements and collecting gems was super fun. 

The same year I visited my first Breakpoint by @SolanaConf in Lisbon right after the FTX crash. I knew I had to get more involved so during the next 2 years I was participating or speaking in almost every large web3 conference in the world. 

~ 2023: We ran acceleration program and partnered up with @KumekaTeam to help Ukrainian builders develop their products on Solana. The same year I put skin in the game by providing significant liquidity to @MarginFinance (top 500 out of 200k users), @Parcl (top 50 out of 750k users) and many other protocols.

~ 2024: I learned a lot at the Founders Villa by @SuperteamUAE and built friendship with many great people from the ecosystem. I am truly grateful to @afscott and the team for putting together the incredible program:
3 weeks, 50+ founders, 40+ workshops, 3 demo days. Inspiring on every level. At the Founders Villa we rebranded from RentSpace to @nomadz_co - a community-driven platform for travelers on Solana. Our mission is to give travelers freedom to use crypto with the lowest booking fees (6-8%), 0% off-ramp through @Backpack exchange and gamification with digital rewards.

I am helping other builders grow through @venture_launch - accelerator and fundraising platform for startups building on Solana. Besides acceleration program we help founders to set up legal structures. In January 2025 we will launch our first cohort to help founders with a milestone based fundraising. If you are building on Solana - you can always DM me and apply to join the program. 

I am honoured to be a mentor at various accelerators in Solana ecosystem: @BuidlerDAO, @MediarsAccel, @SuperteamBLKN, @SuperteamPHL and @KumekaTeam. Helping to grow and being a friend to founders is my favourite part of the journey.

~ 2025: Now we are organising Solana Temple by @flow_bali. It is a 4-week wellness-first program that supported by @solanafndt for founders and investors seeking balance, focus, and sustainable growth. 

Solana Temple is unique as it will have a structured wellness routine with daily morning meditations, sports and yoga practices. We will be packed with workshops, pitch preparation sessions and Demo Days. We will organise hiking, surfing, sound healing, cacao ceremonies, silence days and more. We will track daily health performance of guests with our partners - @CudisWellness. Moreover we will support and track social media and business performance of teams. We will create a lot of high quality content with our partners from @magFOMO.

I am grateful to my partners @cryptoslice and @Yavorskyy13 for creating this program together. To @therealchaseeb for believing in us and supporting. To my girlfriend @cryptokitty3x for supporting me on every single level and creating great content for our brands. And to my teams for working continuously hard while I am writing tweets and generating ideas.

Applications to Solana Temple are opened till 15th of December and we are already more than 50% pre booked: https://t.co/5rY1SyYe8f

New Chapter for WIDI begins now.

Rebranding ahead & sunsetting $WIDI

TL;DR

$WIDI will no longer be the core token across our products. 

Our app, existing & upcoming products, team, roadmap, and long-term vision remain fully active.

To stay aligned with what’s next, our community can burn their $WIDI tokens to be considered for future allocations.

Burn deadline: February 20, 2026
Burn link: https://t.co/Hxow6hdxao

WHY?

Over time, we reached a clear and honest conclusion:

We couldn’t define token utility in a way that genuinely reflected the real value of our products.
As a result, the token’s market dynamics and our product progress started to diverge and we don’t believe that’s healthy for builders or for the community.

WIDI has never been about short-term narratives or token-first decisions.
It’s always been about shipping, iterating fast, and building long-term on Solana.

We’re entering a bigger phase fully focused on DEFAI starting with our upcoming prediction markets & AI integrations.

To do that right, we’re moving toward a cleaner, more flexible capital structure giving us full optionality to stay bootstrapped, raise strategically, or explore acquisitions after the rebrand.

Burning your tokens keeps you eligible for future allocations tied to what comes next.

This update is about alignment.

WHAT WE'VE DONE SO FAR?

Before & since the launch of $WIDI, we’ve:
- Received over-limit grants from Solana Foundation
- Led Blinks ecosystem with our first of its kind tools
- Built an App on Seeker and shipped real products with thousands of active users, generating over $2M in in-app volume so far. (actively being used)
- Airdropped to multiple Solana communities, starting with Seeker holders
- Reached sustainable revenue levels that cover our operational costs

WHAT'S CHANGING?

- All existing products, App will continue to be developed, nothing changes
- $WIDI will no longer have product-level utility and won’t be the core token of our ecosystem
- We’re moving forward with a rebrand (details soon)

New products are coming, starting with prediction markets (launching this week)

Our focus remains 100% on WIDI.

This is not a f. step back.
This is us doubling down. 🤝

LOYALTY MATTERS

We deeply care about our loyal holders and believers.
We couldn’t have come this far without them.

This applies to anything we launch going forward.
To remain part of the WIDI ecosystem and be considered for future opportunities, holders may choose to burn their $WIDI tokens.

Burned tokens will be tracked via an on-chain snapshot of participating wallets.

This snapshot may be used for potential future allocations, including:
- Equity considerations
- Strategic upside from fundraising or acquisition scenarios
- Potential token distribution

Important notes:

- Allocation size (X%) will depend entirely on future capital structure
- More burned = higher proportional consideration
- If you’re not a holder yet, purchasing and burning tokens before the deadline will also make you eligible.
- Long-time holders who participate in the burn will receive additional benefits, as a recognition of their early support.
- Even if you choose not to participate in the burn, $WIDI will remain freely tradable on Solana through permanently locked liquidity pools.

The foundation will wind down its treasury (roughly 40%, including vested supply) and will be excluded from community burns, ensuring this allocation remains fully non-dilutive.

Additionally, our Telegram General channel will remain active.
All official updates and announcements will be shared on our X & Telegram both as always.

My DMs, my team’s DMs, and our support channel’s DMs are always open for any questions, collaborations, suggestions, or support related to our app and products.

Token Burn deadline: February 20, 2026

Also, affiliate badges on X will be reviewed and updated.
- Badges will remain for active leaders using the app
- Core team members will continue to hold their badges
- Inactive or no-longer-aligned affiliate badges will be removed

WHAT'S NEXT?

After the rebrand, WIDI may:
- Raise capital from angels or VCs
- Explore strategic acquisition opportunities
or continue fully bootstrapped

The exact path will depend on what best serves the long-term vision.

Expect more announcements soon👀

Our promise going forward

We’ll continue to be:
- One of the fastest-moving teams in DeFi × AI
- Deeply rooted in Solana
- Focused on building innovative products
- We’ll keep adapting, iterating, improving existing apps, and shipping new ones.

This update is only about the token.
Our commitment to building and to the ecosystem is stronger than ever.

We’re not done.
We’re just more focused.

Team WIDI 🤝

There’s a new ponzi-style game launching on Solana in the middle of the bear market 🎮

I looked into how it works. Here’s the @cashcitydotfun  mechanics breakdown:

• You are a CEO managing up to 15 trading Firms

Your goal:
- hire Interns
- boost them with Advisors and Consumables
- compete against other players for a share of the daily $CASH token emissions

• Core Game Loop

1. Buy a Firm: Costs 1 SOL, gives you 8 desk slots, 1 Advisor slot, and 1 free Intern Pack

2. Open Packs: Use $CASH to buy Intern, Advisor, and Consumable packs (each has different rarity and impact)

3. Seat & Assign: Place Interns at desks to generate base Efficiency. Assign Advisor for a global multiplier. Apply Consumables to Interns for 24h boosts

4. Earn $CASH: Every 15-minute epoch, the network distributes $CASH based on your share of the total network Efficiency

5. Claim & Upgrade: Claim your $CASH, tokens can be used to buy more packs, upgrade Firms, or acquire better Advisors to grow your share

• Economy

– $CASH has no fixed supply cap
– New tokens are minted only when players claim emissions
– All in-game spending (packs, upgrades, etc.) is permanently burned

The team states there are no team, VC, or investor allocations.

Of course there is a referral system in place. If you choose to participate and need a code, mine is 'LZBD-H9JE'

Only risk what you can afford to lose, play responsibly and have fun.

Launch recap of @NOMADZxyz at the @Solana dApp Store.

We participated in the first Hackathon by @solanamobile and @RadiantsDAO.

Many builders were skeptical. Allocating resources to a new ecosystem felt risky.

We built a simple MVP, recorded a short demo, made a few posts, and shipped.

- 200+ teams applied.
- 10 projects won.

We were lucky to be one of them - huge credit to @petro_nomadz and @beeman_nl for the execution.

On January 14, we went live with support from the Solana Mobile team (@0x_diablo, @therealchaseeb, @CryptoMagellan) and @toly.

For builders who are still skeptical about participation in the second Solana Mobile Hackathon, called Monolith, I am attaching some of the metrics.
 
Screenshoot 1: @privy_io 

Over the past month, we’ve continued building steady momentum.

We now have 16,037 total users, with 3,839 active users and 1,777 new users joining recently. Nearly 40% of our user base came from launching the app.

Screenshoot 2: @solscanofficial 

From Jan 14–20, our Solana program processed roughly 8-9k total transactions, peaking at over 2k in a single day on Jan 14.​ Currently, a total of 35k transactions, ~45% came from the app launch.

Screenshoot 3: @cherrydotfun 

We crossed 1,155 total Nomadz reviews with an average rating of 4.54/5 and 86% positive sentiment.​

1,101 reviewers connected a wallet (95% verified), and the average balance of these users is about 1,702 USD, proving we’re reaching high-intent crypto travelers.​

Screenshot 4: X (Nomadz profile analytics)

In the first month after launch, the Nomadz profile generated 539.9K impressions, up 132%.

We had 29.9K total engagements (+214%) with an engagement rate reached 5.5% (+35%). We also saw 4.2K profile visits (+264%), indicating strong curiosity and conversion from content to brand exploration.

All of this started from a lightweight MVP and a decision to participate.
